title: Applied Insights: shifting roles in product building
speakers: Matt Walker (Researcher, Figma), Mike Blight (Manager, Research, Figma)
key_points: Figma's research team examines how responsibilities across design, product, and engineering are shifting as roles in product building evolve.
The session explores what these shifting role boundaries mean for how teams collaborate and work together today.
Delivered as an interactive session led by Figma researchers Matt Walker and Mike Blight, drawing on applied insights from their work.
